title: Quap Gapple Counter
description: Track golden apples by transforming them into ducks changing color based on quantity, letting you spot how many apples other players are carrying in a fun and unique style.
body:
![intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ebbf633c82b99cccd3ae3548a9b9885e3ebd5fd.png) **

⚠️ [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [CIT-RESEWN](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions) IS NEEDED FOR VERSIONS 1.21.3 AND BELOW⚠️

** _**

For versions 1.21.4 and beyond, you can run this pack in vanilla minecraft.

**_ **

No messy numbers here, just a clean and simple duck :)

** # **

🦆 Quap Gap Counter

**

The Duck Gap Counter is a custom Minecraft texture pack designed to provide a clean, intuitive, and fun way to track the number of golden apples in your inventory and on other players by transforming them into uniquely colored ducks.

Each duck color corresponds to a specific range of golden apple counts, offering a clear and immediate visual cue without the need to constantly check numbers. Whether you are in the heat of a PvP battle or exploring deep into survival mode, this pack adds both functionality and charm to your gameplay. The more golden apples you have, the greener the duck becomes. The fewer golden apples you have, the redder the duck becomes.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c90e25a8e4ae7bc8383dc66d364d06b337342755.png) # **✨ Features** - 🦆 Golden apples retextured into ducks, varying in color based on quantity. - 🎨 Color-coded tiers help you recognize how many gaps you have at a glance. - 🧩 Minimalistic and modern design, tailored for competitive and casual players alike. - 🌐 Works seamlessly in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments. - 🚫 No messy or intrusive numbers, everything is visual, clean, and intuitive - 🔄 If you want the reversed order, red -> many gaps, download version [1.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quap-gapple-counter/version/1.0) Perfect for players who enjoy a lightweight visual HUD replacement, the Quap Gap Counter enhances your Minecraft experience with a touch of humor and clarity, without compromising your focus. _For further questions dm polar882 on discord_ For versions 1.21.3 and below, you will need either CIT Resewn or Optifine. For versions 1.21.4 and beyond, you can run this pack in vanilla minecraft. Credit: Lulu, MrOrdenador ![Full Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7546328a5dbe2c510e967e3d5ccf6aef7f90c1b1_0.webp) ![pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86aaf6c138de12a21d99e98bca1e03968501d0af.png) ![Close](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3317ca41676fb4c8a6586b5ba1257dc531d2667.png) _As you can see in the image above, the item is oriented in such a way that it's a lot easier to see the color of it._
